title: eriastrum abramsii
intro: Eriastrum abramsii, also known as Abrams' eriastrum, is a rare species of flowering plant in the borage family that is native to California. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Eriastrum abramsii include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote wound healing. Eriastrum abramsii can be prepared in various herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
